_doc: Phase-3 goal-model structural tunables (plan.md §18.5). Calibrated params (mu/beta/gamma_home/rho/scale) live in data/reference/goal_model_2026.json.
_host_note: WC host advantage applied ONLY to host nations (USA/Canada/Mexico) on home soil, as a log-lambda goal boost (host_log_boost ~ x1.105 goals) that TAPERS to ~0 by the semis/final. This REPLACES applying the generic calibrated gamma_home (~x1.31) to hosts in every match, which over-counted the host edge, compounded across ~10 games, and inverted the ratings (a host out-ranking higher-Elo teams). Defensible football value, NOT fit to the market. Tunable.
